name: LEX_DigiTwin_2025-137857
description: Legal Digital Twin NetLogo model for Revenue Stream Hijacking. Combines SD (financial flows), DES (fraud events), ABM (agent behavior with VES hormones).

procedures.setup:
clear-all
set legitimate-revenue 5000000
set diverted-revenue 0
set legal-exposure 0
set evidence-strength 0
set diversion-rate 0.15
set current-phase 1
set total-months 54
set fraud-events 0
set detection-events 0
create-perpetrators 1 [
  set agent-label "Peter Faucitt"
  set agent-role "perpetrator"
  set cortisol 0 set dopamine 0 set serotonin 0 set norepinephrine 0
  set valence -0.3 set arousal 0.2
  setxy -10 5
  set color red
  set size 2
]
create-accomplices 1 [
  set agent-label "Rynette Farrar"
  set agent-role "accomplice"
  set cortisol 0 set dopamine 0 set serotonin 0 set norepinephrine 0
  set valence -0.2 set arousal 0.4
  setxy -5 0
  set color yellow
  set size 2
]
create-accomplices 1 [
  set agent-label "Danie Bantjies"
  set agent-role "accomplice"
  set cortisol 0 set dopamine 0 set serotonin 0 set norepinephrine 0
  set valence -0.1 set arousal 0.3
  setxy 0 0
  set color yellow
  set size 2
]
create-victims 1 [
  set agent-label "Daniel Faucitt"
  set agent-role "victim"
  set cortisol 0 set dopamine 0 set serotonin 0 set norepinephrine 0
  set valence 0.3 set arousal 0.1
  setxy 5 -5
  set color green
  set size 2
]
create-victims 1 [
  set agent-label "Jacqui Faucitt"
  set agent-role "victim"
  set cortisol 0 set dopamine 0 set serotonin 0 set norepinephrine 0
  set valence 0.2 set arousal 0.1
  setxy 10 -5
  set color green
  set size 2
]
create-employees 1 [
  set agent-label "Linda Kruger"
  set agent-role "employee"
  set cortisol 0 set dopamine 0 set serotonin 0 set norepinephrine 0
  set valence 0.0 set arousal 0.0
  setxy 15 0
  set color yellow
  set size 2
]
create-employees 1 [
  set agent-label "Gayane Williams"
  set agent-role "employee"
  set cortisol 0 set dopamine 0 set serotonin 0 set norepinephrine 0
  set valence 0.0 set arousal 0.0
  setxy 20 0
  set color yellow
  set size 2
]
create-accomplices 1 [
  set agent-label "Darren Farrar"
  set agent-role "accomplice"
  set cortisol 0 set dopamine 0 set serotonin 0 set norepinephrine 0
  set valence 0.0 set arousal 0.1
  setxy 25 0
  set color yellow
  set size 2
]
reset-ticks
procedures.go:
if ticks >= total-months [ stop ]
;; SD: Financial flows
let diversion diversion-rate * legitimate-revenue / 12
set legitimate-revenue legitimate-revenue - diversion
set diverted-revenue diverted-revenue + diversion
;; DES: Random fraud events
if random-float 1 < 0.3 [
  set fraud-events fraud-events + 1
  set legal-exposure legal-exposure + 100000
  ask perpetrators [ set cortisol min list 1 (cortisol + 0.1) set dopamine min list 1 (dopamine + 0.05) ]
]
;; ABM: Agent hormone decay
ask turtles [
  set cortisol cortisol * 0.97
  set dopamine dopamine * 0.97
  set serotonin serotonin * 0.97
  set norepinephrine norepinephrine * 0.97
]
;; Phase transitions
update-phase
tick
procedures.update-phase:
if ticks >= 0 and ticks < 12 [ set current-phase 1 ]
if ticks >= 12 and ticks < 18 [ set current-phase 2 ]
if ticks >= 18 and ticks < 36 [ set current-phase 3 ]
if ticks >= 36 and ticks < 42 [ set current-phase 4 ]
if ticks >= 42 and ticks < 48 [ set current-phase 5 ]
if ticks >= 48 and ticks < 54 [ set current-phase 6 ]

pens.name: Victims
pens.code: if any? victims [ plot mean [cortisol] of victims ]
